commit.message:
docs: actualizar hash en changelog #051

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: targeted EQ super-resolution for MusicGen and TTS audio chains

MusicGen music chain (audio_processor.py):
- Move HighShelfFilter from 10 kHz → 8 kHz: the previous shelf was
  operating almost entirely in the dead zone above the 12 kHz Nyquist
  ceiling of 24 kHz intermediate audio. MusicGen's actual artifact zone
  (grainy autoregressive-decoding shimmer) sits at 8–10 kHz, not above
  10 kHz. ACE-Step's chain was already correctly placed at 8 kHz.
- Reduce shelf gain from -4 dB to -3 dB: the 8 kHz shelf now attenuates
  more of the 8–10 kHz danger zone so the total suppression is similar.
- Add PeakFilter(5500 Hz, +0.8 dB, Q=0.6): psychoacoustic presence boost
  just below the artifact zone — adds perceived openness / "air" to
  compensate for the missing 12–22 kHz octave without amplifying shimmer.

TTS voice master chain (post_processor.py):
- Move LowpassFilter from 15 kHz → 10.5 kHz: Kokoro TTS is 24 kHz native
  (Nyquist 12 kHz) upsampled to 44.1 kHz, so no TTS signal exists above
  12 kHz. The previous 15 kHz LPF was completely inactive. Moving to
  10.5 kHz creates a smooth, analog-sounding rolloff that masks the abrupt
  Nyquist brick-wall at 12 kHz, removing the "FM radio" quality of
  unmasked band-limited content. De-essing (7 kHz) is already handled
  above this filter so consonants are not noticeably dulled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(voice): switch Deepgram TTS from linear16 to mp3 encoding

The AudioWorklet PCM pipeline (linear16 → Float32 → ring buffer →
resampling) has been producing silent output. Root cause: when all
tiers were migrated from OpenAI to Deepgram TTS (commit e80d682),
the encoding changed from mp3 to linear16, routing audio through
the AudioWorklet path instead of the reliable Audio element path.

Fix: request mp3 from Deepgram API instead of linear16. This routes
through the proven Audio element playback path (blob URL → new Audio()
→ play()), completely bypassing the AudioWorklet pipeline.

Trade-off: no progressive streaming (buffers full response before
playback). Acceptable for TTS responses which are typically 5-30s
of speech with sub-second TTFB from Deepgram.

commit.message:
fix: remove corrupted-storylet fallback padding from selectStorylets

When fewer than 3 eligible storylets were found, selectStorylets() padded
the picked array with fallbackStorylet() (id: "corrupted-storylet"). Those
fake IDs caused 400 errors on every Supabase storylet_runs query and
rendered a broken card in the play UI ("This event could not be loaded").

Changes:
- selectStorylets.ts: remove the `while (picked.length < 3) { push(fallbackStorylet()) }`
  block and its import; return whatever real storylets were found (0–3)
- storyletValidation.ts: add `requires_not_precluded` and `requires_money_band`
  to KNOWN_REQUIREMENT_KEYS to suppress spurious warning logs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Cross-model validation: DeepSeek +5.3pp (POSITIVE), phi-2 +6.7pp (POSITIVE, out-of-family), Qwen3-1.7B +1.3pp (NULL)

Effect replicates on DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B (oracle 100% k=3) and phi-2 (out-of-family).
Does NOT replicate on Qwen3-1.7B (boundary condition, not contradiction).
Fix comma-formatted number parsing in verifier and add model tag to output filenames.

Committed by Devansh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat(comunicação): destino do relatório — número, grupo ou ambos (#19)

* feat(crm): drag-to-reorder Kanban columns directly on the board

- Adds draggable="true" + ondragstart/ondragover/ondrop/ondragend to each .crm-col
- Shows ⠿ drag handle icon in column header (visible on hover)
- col-dragging: fades column to 35% opacity while being dragged
- col-dragover: green dashed outline highlights drop target
- colDrop reorders crmStages array and persists to agente_config in Supabase, then re-renders board
- Guards .crm-cards ondragover/ondrop to ignore events during column drag (colDragSrcId check)
- dragCard now calls event.stopPropagation() so card drags don't bubble to colDragStart

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(crm): inline rename of Kanban columns (double-click)

- Double-click on column title to edit inline
- Shows underlined input with green border-bottom
- Enter or blur saves; Escape cancels
- Guard against double-save (dataset.saving flag)
- Persists to agente_config in Supabase

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(agente): links de referência e toggle de busca na web

UI (page-agente):
- Toggle "Busca na Web em Tempo Real" → salva web_search_enabled em agente_config
- Card "Links de Referência" → lista de URLs com descrição, adicionar/remover,
  salva web_urls_fixas (JSON array) em agente_config
- loadWebAgente() chamado ao abrir a aba Agente

Workflow (node-monta-config):
- web_search_enabled=false injeta instrução para o agente NÃO usar a busca
- web_urls_fixas injeta lista de sites prioritários no system prompt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(comunicação): configurar destino do relatório e momento de envio

UI (page-qualificacao):
- Seletor "Para quem enviar o relatório": Número / Grupo / Ambos (padrão)
- Banner informativo: "Somente quando qualificado" (fixo, não configurável)
- Salva automaticamente notif_destino em agente_config ao selecionar
- loadConfigs() restaura a seleção salva

Workflow:
- node-processa-resposta: lê notif_destino do config e:
  - Zera grupoDestino se notif_destino === 'numero' (desativa grupo)
  - Expõe notifDestino no output do nó
- Novo nó IF "Deve notificar número?" entre Lead qualificado? e Envia relatório ao responsável
  - TRUE → envia ao número; FALSE → pula (quando notif_destino === 'grupo')

- Replace 8 hardcoded cables with live TeleGeography API data (597 real submarine cable routes, top 100 rendered)
- Add Cloudflare PoP status (470 locations) and GCP incident monitoring via live APIs

- New info cards: Cloud Health, Internet Health, Anomaly Correlation

refactor: Rename "Transferencia" to "Otra operación" and add is_active support for transfer types

Rename all UI labels from "Transferencia" to "Otra operación" across the
accounting module to better reflect that operations between accounts include
deposits, withdrawals, and cash movements — not just transfers.

Also fix the is_active field for transfer_types: add the missing DB column,
update the Sequelize model, and wire it through the API routes so the
frontend checkbox actually works.

Includes 41 unit tests (21 frontend Vitest + 20 backend Jest) covering
label correctness and is_active CRUD behavior.
